name: Fudge Cakes
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Pillsbury's Best All-Purpose Flour, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream butter and gradually add sugar, creaming well.
3. Add egg yolks, milk, and melted unsweetened chocolate. Blend in the dry ingredients; mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in the nuts.
5. Fold in 2 stiffly beaten egg whites.
6. Turn into a 9 x 9 inch pan, well greased and lightly floured on bottom.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees) for 25 to 30 minutes.
8. Cool and frost with Chocolate Frosting. Cut into bars or squares.
For use with Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour, omit baking powder and salt.
FOR CUPCAKE BROWNIES: Fill muffin pans, lined with paper baking cups, 1/4 to 1/3 full. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes. Cool and frost.
